case_title: ZANDRA FRANCISCO VS. ADRIAN JAY PALAROAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2014 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO JAN-02-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT.
